title: module 1
content:
students should acquire the concept of sewerage system,
wastewater characteristics.
Stage 2: After completing

title: module 2
content:

title: module 3

Stage 4: After completing

title: module 4

Stage 5: The whole project along with layout of sludge treatment plant to be presented before the
